raw: Patrons can purchase tickets online at plimoth.org or in person, when they arrive at the Museum. If purchasing tickets at the location the library coupon must be presented to Plimoth Patuxet Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum. Patrons may purchase a Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass, for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Pass membership also includes access to online educational lectures offered over Zoom. Visit the member events page at www.plimoth.org /events for more details. This is a physical pass that must be picked up at the Main Branch library.
